combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
Starbucks Coffee Company
Skip to main content
It's a great day for coffee
Start an order
Bold new matcha menu
Meet the matcha edit: delicious matcha made from shade-grown green tea leaves, layered with flavors of banana bread, double berry and Dubai chocolate.
Order from the matcha menu
Caramel protein is here
Power up with the new Caramel Protein Latte and Caramel Protein Matcha. Handcrafted with Protein-boosted Milk for up to 31 grams of protein per grande. Available hot, iced and with sugar-free syrup.
Explore caramel protein
Free drink? It’s yours.
When you join, enjoy a
free handcrafted drink
with purchase. It’s our way of welcoming you to Starbucks
®
Rewards during your first week.*
Join now
A new era of bakery
Six new crave-worthy treats have arrived, blending global inspiration and nostalgic flavors. Find them in our refreshed bakery case.
Order now
Grab a seat. Get free refills.
When you stay to enjoy your favorite beverage in the café, refills of hot and iced brewed coffee or tea are on us.**
Order now
Starbucks is proud to support Team USA
in the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026
*Valid for new Starbucks Rewards members for 7 days from sign up. Coupon will be available in the offers tab of your Starbucks app following sign up and may take up to 48 hours to arrive. Good at participating U.S. stores for a handcrafted menu-sized beverage ($8 max value) with qualifying purchase. Qualifying purchase excludes alcohol, Starbucks Card and Starbucks Cards reloads. Limit one. Cannot be combined with other offers or discounts. Excludes delivery services. Sign up by 3/31/2026.
**Free refills of hot and iced brewed coffee and tea during same store visit. Excludes Cold Brew, Nitro Cold Brew, Iced Tea Lemonade, flavored Iced Tea and Starbucks Refreshers
®
base. At participating stores.​

Featured winter menu: Starbucks Coffee Company
Featured winter menu
Skip to main content
Make the moment delicious
New Iced Double Berry Matcha
A vibrant lift and here to stay. Colorful layers of strawberry puree, matcha and a silky raspberry-flavored cold foam come together for a delicious fusion of fruit and matcha.
Order now
New Iced Banana Bread Matcha
Inspired by a bakery classic. Our smooth matcha paired with brown-sugar flavor, milk and a layer of velvety banana cold foam with caramel-crunch topping. Here to stay.
Order now
New Iced Double Berry Matcha

Order now

Inspired by a bakery classic. Our smooth matcha paired with brown-sugar flavor, milk and a layer of velvety banana cold foam with caramel-crunch topping. Here to stay.
Order now
New Iced Dubai Chocolate Matcha
A viral favorite and here to stay. Our vibrant
matcha latte with sweet pistachio sauce and a layer of chocolate cream cold foam. Finished with salted brown-buttery topping.
Order now
New Iced Dubai Chocolate Mocha
Dubai chocolate meets coffee in this here to stay delight. Our signature espresso and rich chocolate mocha sauce with silky pistachio cream cold foam and a salted brown-buttery topping.
Order now

matcha latte with sweet pistachio sauce and a layer of chocolate cream cold foam. Finished with salted brown-buttery topping.
Order now

Dubai chocolate meets coffee in this here to stay delight. Our signature espresso and rich chocolate mocha sauce with silky pistachio cream cold foam and a salted brown-buttery topping.
Order now
New Dubai Chocolate Bite
Viral trend meets gourmet tart. A chocolate shortbread crust filled with crunchy kataifi pistachio cream and topped with chocolate drizzle and pistachio crumbles.
Order now
New Chocolate Pistachio Loaf
Dubai chocolate inspired. Chocolate cake and pistachio-flavored cake swirled together in a marble delight. Topped with pistachio pieces. Great warmed. For a limited time.
Order now

Viral trend meets gourmet tart. A chocolate shortbread crust filled with crunchy kataifi pistachio cream and topped with chocolate drizzle and pistachio crumbles.
Order now
New Chocolate Pistachio Loaf
Dubai chocolate inspired. Chocolate cake and pistachio-flavored cake swirled together in a marble delight. Topped with pistachio pieces. Great warmed. For a limited time.
Order now
New Cookie Croissant Swirl
Flaky and sweet. A buttery croissant swirled with real cocoa. Topped with a chocolate streusel made with chocolate cookie pieces​.
Order now
New Berry Blondie
A fruity twist on a classic. A golden, buttery blondie with white-chocolate pieces and swirled ribbons of sweet and tangy raspberry and blueberry jam​.

meta.meta_description: Explore our winter menu of handcrafted drinks, order ahead, sign up for Starbucks® Rewards, manage your gift card and more.
